Title: Prohibits artificial intelligence chatbots from using features which are considered unsafe for minors
Summary: Prohibits artificial intelligence chatbots from using features which are considered unsafe for minors; defines terms; specifies what are considered unsafe features; provides rights of action; directs rules and regulations to be established.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to prohibiting artificial intelligence chatbots from using features which are considered unsafe for minors
